title: Tier S Manifest
description: JSON Schema for Tier S block manifests. Tier S = at most 2 files modified or created.

id.description: Block identifier. Format: block-NNN (zero-padded to 3 digits).

tier.description: Must be S for this schema.

kind.description: Nature of the work this block performs.

phase.description: Phase this block belongs to. Format: phase-N.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the block.

dependencies.description: Block IDs that must be status:done before this block starts.

read.description: Files read during block execution (not modified).

modify.description: Existing files modified by this block.

create.description: New files created by this block.

files.$comment: Tier S constraint: len(modify) + len(create) <= 2. Validated by /validate-manifest command (not enforced by JSON Schema array lengths because JSON Schema cannot sum two array lengths natively).

name.description: Unique gate identifier within this manifest.

paths.description: File paths checked by file-changed or file-exists gates.

description.description: Human-readable description of what passes this gate.

gates.description: Pass conditions that must all be met before block can be closed.

created_at.description: Date manifest was created. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

scope.description: Scope constraint for this block. Optional.

axiom_override.description: If an axiom is overridden, state which and why. See PROTOCOLS.md axiom override protocol.

tierSConstraint.$comment: Tier S: len(files.modify) + len(files.create) must be <= 2. Checked manually by /validate-manifest because JSON Schema cannot cross-reference array lengths across sibling properties.
